name: The Wake Claim
description: Survive the station slaughter, secure the hidden smuggler ship, gather a crew, and get out before Port Sable decides you belong in a body chute.

stages.text: Escape the drydock gunfight and reach the hidden berth.
stages.onAdvanceLog: The berth seals groan open around the hidden ship.

stages.text: Claim the Scavenger's Wake and get it spaceworthy.
stages.onAdvanceLog: The Wake is yours. Now you need somewhere worth running to.

stages.text: Choose your first jump: Ember Hollow or Glassreef.
stages.onAdvanceLog: You leave Port Sable behind and commit to a trail.

stages.text: Learn why someone on Port Sable wanted the ship buried.

name: Ashes of a Bad Loan
description: A local fixer wants a ledger recovered before station enforcers burn it.

stages.text: Find the debtor locker in Port Sable's lower vents.

name: Patchwork Loyalties
description: Vexa's old salvage crew sold her out for civic immunity.

stages.text: Hear Vexa out once the ship is yours.
Track the crew's fence through Ember Hollow.

name: Convoy of One
description: Talon has unfinished business with the raider crews haunting Ember Hollow.

stages.text: Recruit Talon and learn what happened to his convoy.
Put down Boss Krail and decide who gets the salvage.
